pages.raw_text:
The Canadian Pacific owns the
Spokane & International railroad,
extending from Spokane across the
Canadian border, possessing 81 per
cent of the stock as well as a 25
year option on the remainder.


Canadian Pacific trains are now
being operated out of Spokane to
st. Paul and Minneapolis via the
Canadian line, and with the 500
lire already developed as far as
Columbia Falls, Mont, close to the
Idaho border, the entire line of the
Canadian Pacific in the United
States is expected to be concluded
WITHIN few years.


The North Coast railroad will
run parallel to the Great Northern
tracks through Washington. and it
is this route that the Canadian Pa
cific will use from Spokane at the
time of the fair in Seattle Con-
nections with the 500 line will
probably be made in 1910.


The Spokane Press delivered to
